# Soft11 Async1 Tool600 Contract

## Soft 11
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.11 with quality bias floor 0.09 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 1
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.01 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 600
tool result budgets default to 600 chars with 10-char previews; Grep head defaults to 40 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/usage/footer vitest
